title: Comparing Core Strengthening and Pilates Exercises for People with Low Back Pain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5af2a","text":"This randomized clinical trial aims to compare the efficacy of core strengthening exercises and Pilates exercises in reducing pain and improving function in individuals with mechanical low back pain. We expect both interventions to be effective, with potential differences in outcomes related to core strength, disability, and quality of life.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
